description: Collect ten hill-start waypoints across Sydney's Eastern Suburbs. Stop safely on an incline, move off smoothly, and have the supervisor confirm the first clean attempt.

hills.name: Old South Head Road Rise
hills.description: Gentle uphill start option on a broad Vaucluse corridor.
hills.supervisor_notes: Good first hill-start badge. Choose a quiet period and practise securing with the park brake before moving off.

hills.name: Hopetoun Avenue Climb
hills.description: Narrower harbour-side incline that mixes slope control with tight positioning.
hills.supervisor_notes: Combine with Narrow Street practice only once the learner is comfortable. Keep sessions short.

hills.name: Drumalbyn Road Slope
hills.description: Residential incline with a clear uphill restart opportunity.
hills.supervisor_notes: Watch parked cars near the pinch point and pick a segment with good visibility.

hills.name: Victoria Road Crest
hills.description: Useful mid-suburb gradient for repeated smooth uphill launches.
hills.supervisor_notes: Aim for clean clutch or brake release with no rollback; repeat a few times rather than hunting for steeper hills.

hills.name: Dover Road Hill Start
hills.description: Classic Eastern Suburbs incline with stronger grade than the introductory Vaucluse roads.
hills.supervisor_notes: Best in lighter traffic. Keep the learner focused on observation before moving off, not just the hill itself.

hills.name: Military Road Approach
hills.description: Steeper approach road where traffic awareness matters as much as the gradient.
hills.supervisor_notes: Only attempt after easier hill badges. Choose off-peak and avoid pushing through if traffic builds.

hills.name: Ocean Street Rise
hills.description: Inner-city slope useful for combining hill starts with busier urban driving.
hills.supervisor_notes: A good transition from quiet streets to more complex environments. Keep eyes well ahead for pedestrians and buses.

hills.name: Bronte Road Descent/Climb
hills.description: Coastal gradient leading toward Bronte Beach, good for repeated hill starts outside the harbour zone.
hills.supervisor_notes: Pick a calm time; combine with Beach Pack only after the learner is comfortable with the slope.

hills.name: Arden Street Climb
hills.description: Well-known Coogee incline with enough gradient to build confidence without going extreme.
hills.supervisor_notes: Ideal after a Coogee car-park session; reset calmly between attempts to avoid rushed starts.

hills.name: Malabar Road Rise
hills.description: Steeper southern coastal hill for the capstone hill-start badge.
hills.supervisor_notes: Treat as the final unlock in the set. Use daylight, low traffic, and only after several easier successful climbs.

honourable_mentions.name: New South Head Road rise
honourable_mentions.note: Busy corridor; better for advanced urban hill starts than beginner practice.

honourable_mentions.name: Birriga Road
honourable_mentions.note: Steep local option if you want a Bellevue Hill-only collection later.

honourable_mentions.name: Clovelly Road approach
honourable_mentions.note: Good extension for a future coastal hill pack.

_meta.coordinate_note: Bounding boxes are approximate for v1. Verify on-site before production.
_meta.safety_note: Supervisor should only confirm after a full stop on the incline and a smooth move-off with no unsafe rollback.
